components.value: V, S, M (the skin of a toad)

spell_resistance.value: equal to 10 + half your caster level . You also emit an aura that emanates 30 feet from you. Enemy creatures within the aura are shaken . Each time a creature shaken by this aura hits you with a melee attack, that creature becomes frightened for 1d4 rounds, though at the end of that duration it is no longer affected by this aura. description.value: You become a larger, awful version of yourself. You grow to size Large, and take on features that horrify your enemies. You gain the following abilities: a +6 size bonus to Strength, a +4 size bonus to Constitution, a +6 natural armor bonus, DR 10/magic, and
